CustomField.description: Optional repo-relative path to a CumulusCI mapping YAML (e.g. datasets/invoice_generation.yml). When populated alongside ApexScriptPathTxt__c, the cockpit shows both loader modes — Apex is single-transaction, mapping-YAML is bulk-API friendlier for larger datasets.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional path to a CumulusCI mapping YAML for bulk-API loading.
CustomField.label: Mapping YAML Path
